div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 211px; height: 120px; padding-top: 220px; margin-left: 20px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; width: 209px; height: 120px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
